sources: Walrus is a decentralized blob storage protocol developed by Mysten Labs for the Sui ecosystem.
It uses erasure coding to split data into fragments, allowing recovery even if up to two-thirds of storage nodes are unavailable.
Storage nodes are coordinated and paid through the Sui blockchain, which handles metadata and proofs.

sources: Walrus is a decentralized blob storage protocol developed by Mysten Labs for the Sui ecosystem.
It uses erasure coding to split data into fragments, allowing recovery even if up to two-thirds of storage nodes are unavailable.
Storage nodes are coordinated and paid through the Sui blockchain, which handles metadata and proofs.
state.report: Walrus is a decentralized blob storage protocol built by Mysten Labs specifically for the Sui ecosystem. It employs erasure coding to fragment data, ensuring full recovery even if up to two-thirds of storage nodes become unavailable. The Sui blockchain coordinates storage nodes and manages payments by handling metadata and verification proofs.
